meaning: n.伊斯兰教的圣者墓,圣者祠,圣墓的朝觐者
examples: Ziarat is a rural part of an impoverished province.
Regional commander Major-General Sajjad Ghani says the capture of Banai Baba Ziarat was a major setback for the militants and has paved the way for gains on the battlefield.
The Juniper forest ecosystem of Ziarat-Pakistan is reputed to be the oldest and world's second largest, and harbors some of the unique species of Juniperusexcelsapolycarpu.
